scripts.dev:up: docker compose up -d db minio minio-init && pnpm dev:all
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green.bold,cyan.bold "pnpm --filter backend start:dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.dev:all:with-infra-logs: concurrently -n INFRA,BACKEND,FRONTEND -c yellow.bold,green.bold,cyan.bold "pnpm logs:infra" "pnpm --filter backend start:dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.dev:up:with-infra-logs: docker compose up -d db minio minio-init && pnpm dev:all:with-infra-logs
